data.title: Koi Computers offers servers supporting NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition for federal gov't.
data.description: In Chicago on January 29, 2026, Koi Computers announced the launch of a range of enterprise servers that are compatible with the NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition. Koi Computers is a prominent provider of high performance servers and clusters for the federal government. The NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition is known for its advanced capabilities and efficient performance.

data.title: MetaMetrics and North Dakota Department of Public Instruction collaborate to enhance career readiness with RUReady.ND, linking assessment data to career paths.
data.description: The recent launch of the RUReady.ND program by ND Career Technical Education aims to connect academic readiness with practical career paths by leveraging students' assessment data. The initiative was announced on January 29, 2026, in a partnership between MetaMetrics® and the education departments of Durham, N.C., and Bismarck, N.D. This innovative program seeks to provide students with a clearer transition from their educational achievements to the professional world.

data.title: PatientRightsAdvocate.org praises DOL rule for healthcare price transparency, revealing insurance carrier fees.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, PatientRightsAdvocate.org (PRA) issued a statement praising the Department of Labor (DOL) under the Trump Administration for implementing a rule requiring insurance carriers to disclose true prices and intermediary fees related to their pharmacy benefit manager subsidiaries. This move aims to increase transparency and combat profiteering within the industry.

data.title: authID and MajorKey chosen by global retailer for high-assurance identity onboarding and access protection, highlighting authID's leadership in workforce verification and halting AI-driven hiring fraud.
data.description: authID's recent acquisition of a major new customer highlights its position as a leader in workforce verification and combating AI-driven hiring fraud within global enterprises. This success showcases the company's expertise in providing solutions to prevent fraudulent practices in hiring processes. The significant growth in clientele further solidifies authID's reputation in the industry.

data.title: Freedom Debt Relief named as one of America's Best Customer Service providers for 2026 by USA Today.
data.description: In San Mateo, California on January 29, 2026, Freedom Debt Relief, a prominent debt settlement service provider in the U.S., was honored by USA Today as part of "America's Best Customer Service for Financial Services 2026." The company, known for its extensive experience and size, secured a spot among the top performers.

data.title: Sky Harbour's Series 2026 Bonds priced at 6% yield, issued by SKYH Capital III, for aviation facilities project.
data.description: In West Harrison, N.Y., Sky Harbour Group Corporation (NYSE: SKYH, SKYH WS) revealed that its subsidiary, Sky Harbour Capital III LLC, priced the Series 2026 Aviation Facilities Project bonds at a 6.0% yield. These bonds, known as the Series 2026 Bonds, were priced at par as the company continues to build the first nationwide network of Home Base Operator (HBO) campuses for business aircraft. This move marks a significant development in SHG's aviation infrastructure efforts.

data.title: Hampton finalizes share-for-debt deal, closing with unspecified amount of shares.
data.description: In a recent report, it was announced that the unemployment rate in the country had dropped to 4.5% in September, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The total number of employed individuals also increased by 250,000, reaching a total of 20 million people in the workforce. Additionally, the report highlighted that the economy had grown by 3.2% in the last quarter, surpassing analysts' expectations. The government is now optimistic about reaching its target of 5% growth by the end of the year. This positive trend is attributed to various factors, including increased consumer spending, a boost in manufacturing output, and successful government policies aimed at stimulating economic growth. The current outlook indicates a promising trajectory for the country's economy in the coming months.
